# Agent Reach

Agent Reach is a Windows-first integration layer for research tooling on Codex-style agents.

## Quick start

- Install guide: https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/install.md
- Downstream usage: https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/downstream-usage.md
- Codex integration: https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/codex-integration.md
- Python SDK: https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/python-sdk.md
- Troubleshooting: https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md
- Repository README: https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/README.md
- Skill guides:
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach-shape-brief/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach-budgeted-research/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach-orchestrate/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach-propose-improvements/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach-maintain-proposals/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach/blob/main/agent_reach/skills/agent-reach-maintain-release/SKILL.md
- For broad rough asks that need explicit budgets before collection: `agent-reach-budgeted-research`
- Default rough-ask entrypoint when collection should start now: `agent-reach-orchestrate`

## Install the latest fork build

- `uv tool install --force git+https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach.git`
- `agent-reach skill --install`
- `agent-reach version`
- Pin an exact build with `git+https://github.com/iwachacha/Agent-Reach.git@<commit-or-ref>`
- Do not rely on upstream release tags to identify the latest fork build

## Stable external surfaces

- `agent-reach channels --json`
- `agent-reach doctor --json`
- `agent-reach doctor --json --probe`
- `agent-reach collect --channel <name> --operation <op> --input <value> --json`
- `agent-reach schema collection-result --json`
- `agent-reach plan candidates --input .agent-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `agent-reach ledger validate --input .agent-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `agent-reach ledger summarize --input .agent-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `agent-reach ledger query --input .agent-reach/evidence.jsonl --filter "channel == github" --json`
- `agent-reach ledger append --input RESULT.json --output .agent-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `agent-reach install --dry-run --json`
- `agent-reach export-integration --client codex --format json`
- `agent-reach check-update --json`
- Python: `from agent_reach import AgentReachClient`

## Current scope

- Supported channels: `web`, `exa_search`, `github`, `hatena_bookmark`, `bluesky`, `qiita`, `youtube`, `rss`, `searxng`, `crawl4ai`, `hacker_news`, `mcp_registry`, `reddit`, `twitter`
- Use the exact stable channel names from `agent-reach channels --json`; for example, Hatena Bookmark is `hatena_bookmark`, not `hatena`
- Purpose: bootstrapper, channel registry, readiness diagnostics, thin read-only collection helper
- Non-goal in this phase: full workflow orchestration such as scheduling, ranking, summarization, or publishing
- External projects should prefer `agent-reach collect --json` and should not copy `.codex-plugin`, `.mcp.json`, or `agent_reach/skills` by default
